description: A TV meteorologist needs to write a script for their weather segment.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest data from weather models (temperature, precipitation, wind).

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all the necessary meteorological data.

nodes.task_description: Translate the complex data into simple, understandable language for a general audience.

expected_outcome.value: The script explains the weather in easy-to-understand terms.

nodes.task_description: Structure the script to align with the graphics that will be shown on screen (e.g., the 7-day forecast graphic).

expected_outcome.value: The script is synchronized with the visual elements of the broadcast.
